audio_identity.overall_style: Parodic shooter with recorded voice commentary and quirky themes
distinctive_elements: Japanese voice actor narration by Jōji Yanami
Parodies of Konami games (Ganbare Goemon, Tokimeki Memorial, TwinBee, Xexex)
Bizarre and quirky thematic audio design
Part of Konami's 'Sound Response' series with emphasis on recorded voice audio
influences: Japanese culture and shooter game conventions

notes: Tier T3 data - limited audio documentation available. Source provides gameplay and development context but minimal specific audio/music parameter details. SA-1 chip enabled voice samples and enhanced audio capabilities.
